text: Discover how CUGH supports universities and partners in advancing global health Discover our latest press releases and announcements Access our comprehensive history of webinars, interviews, global health trainings, education and research products Browse our comprehensive catalogue of webinars, interviews, & symposia Join our conferences, webinars, networking events, and more Access past CUGH conference summaries, presentations, events, and videos Supporting the University as a Transforming Force in Global Health The Consortium of Universities for Global Health (CUGH) is a Washington, DC based non-profit organization of over 100 academic institutions and other organizations from around the world engaged in addressing global health challenges.
source: Consortium of Universities for Global Health (CUGH)

text: CUGH was established in 2008 with generous funding from the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation and The Rockefeller Foundation. Press Release: CUGH Releases White Paper on the Human Impact of Shifting U. S.
